name: Steganography Embedding Files
notes:
This rule detects embedding of steganography files.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Steganography Unzip Hidden Information From Picture File
SIGMA Description: Detects extracting of zip file from image file


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success
when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(steghide.*?embed).*?' AND ( LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(-cf).*?' OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(-ef).*?' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Steganography Embedding Files on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(steghide.*?embed).*?'   AND      (          LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(-cf).*?'       OR LOWER("Command") MATCHES '.*?(-ef).*?'     ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects extraction of steganography files.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
